note: Patched 2 of 3 CR findings: refined isRateLimited to require positive rate-limit signal (x-ratelimit-remaining=0 or retry-after) so plain-403 token errors aren't masked as throttling; wrapped search/enrichment fetch + JSON parse in try/catch to keep transient blips from killing the whole sync. Skipped the mockHttp total_count finding — the parser does not read total_count, so changing the test fixture would not strengthen contract coverage.
